creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I understand your point.

Just for completeness of information I received errors while trying to install the calendar and contact apps via the apps window. I thought it was a requirement of the main package, to tell the truth.

I'm not completely sure if creating separate packages for nextcloud apps is really correct, since it has it's internal management.

For the time being I'll just use php7-extensions properly configured to add all the packages my server needs.

Closing this bug report. Thanks for the feedback.
